items.title: Rock-pooling at Gylly
items.experience:
Early-morning survey of the intertidal zone. We logged **17 species** across three transects, from beadlet anemones to shore crabs.

Click-through photos like this one let visitors read the story behind each moment — swap the image and text in the admin panel.

items.title: Seagrass snorkel survey
items.experience: Snorkelling a *Zostera marina* meadow to record shoot density and note the juvenile fish using it as a nursery habitat.

items.title: Field trip — the Lizard
items.experience: A day mapping rocky-shore zonation along one of the most biodiverse stretches of the Cornish coast.

items.title: Lab work
items.experience: Identifying and measuring invertebrate samples under the microscope for a biodiversity study.
